'''vafate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:urothelially|urothelially]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| v-f-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:urothelially|urothelially]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| vafate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:vafate|vafate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:vafatesher|vafatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:vafatesherĂ«m|vafatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:vafatero|vafatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:vafateshĂ«|vafateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:vafateshĂ«m|vafateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokivafatero|gokivafatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokivafateshĂ«|gokivafateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokivafateshĂ«m|gokivafateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:govafankerom|govafankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:govafankeshĂ«|govafankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:govafankeshĂ«m|govafankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:govafankeya|govafankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:vafaterom|vafaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:vafatemu|vafatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:vafateya|vafateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokivafaterom|gokivafaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokivafatemu|gokivafatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokivafateya|gokivafateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:vafafate|vafafate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:vafafatesher|vafafatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:vafafatesherĂ«m|vafafatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:vafafatero|vafafatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:vafafateshĂ«|vafafateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:vafafateshĂ«m|vafafateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokivafafatero|gokivafafatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokivafafateshĂ«|gokivafafateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokivafafateshĂ«m|gokivafafateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:govafafankerom|govafafankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:govafafankeshĂ«|govafafankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:govafafankeshĂ«m|govafafankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:govafafankeya|govafafankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:vafafaterom|vafafaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:vafafatemu|vafafatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:vafafateya|vafafateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokivafafaterom|gokivafafaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokivafafatemu|gokivafafatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokivafafateya|gokivafafateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:vĂŠfĂŠte|vĂŠfĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:vĂŠfĂŠtesher|vĂŠfĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:vĂŠfĂŠtesherĂ«m|vĂŠfĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:vĂŠfĂŠtero|vĂŠfĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:vĂŠfĂŠteshĂ«|vĂŠfĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:vĂŠfĂŠteshĂ«m|vĂŠfĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokivĂŠfĂŠtero|gokivĂŠfĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokivĂŠfĂŠteshĂ«|gokivĂŠfĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokivĂŠfĂŠteshĂ«m|gokivĂŠfĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-

|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:govĂŠfĂŠnkeshĂ«|govĂŠfĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:govĂŠfĂŠnkeshĂ«m|govĂŠfĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-

|-

|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:vĂŠfĂŠtemu|vĂŠfĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:vĂŠfĂŠteya|vĂŠfĂŠteya]]
|-

|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokivĂŠfĂŠtemu|gokivĂŠfĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokivĂŠfĂŠteya|gokivĂŠfĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:vafafte|vafafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:vafaftesher|vafaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:vafaftesherĂ«m|vafaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:vafaftero|vafaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:vafafteshĂ«|vafafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:vafafteshĂ«m|vafafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokivafaftero|gokivafaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokivafafteshĂ«|gokivafafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokivafafteshĂ«m|gokivafafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:govafafnkerom|govafafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:govafafnkeshĂ«|govafafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:govafafnkeshĂ«m|govafafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:govafafnkeya|govafafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:vafafterom|vafafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:vafaftemu|vafaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:vafafteya|vafafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokivafafterom|gokivafafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokivafaftemu|gokivafaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokivafafteya|gokivafafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
